headline: Paychex Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: PAYX heads into Q3'26 results, with revenues projected to jump 18.3% y/y and earnings rising on Management Solutions growth and steady gains across key segments.

headline: Rising Big Data Market Aids TRU Amid Seasonality & High Rivalry
summary: TransUnion rides on big data and analytics growth with strong results and liquidity. Debt, seasonality and fierce competition cloud its outlook.
